---
title: "GPD Tail"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{GPD Tail}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
library(DPmixGPD)
library(nimble)

# Fetch helpers directly from the namespace to work even if not exported/attached during pkgdown
build_nimble_bundle <- getFromNamespace("build_nimble_bundle", "DPmixGPD")
run_mcmc_bundle_manual <- getFromNamespace("run_mcmc_bundle_manual", "DPmixGPD")
# Use the generic predict from stats so S3 dispatch still works for mixgpd_fit
predict <- stats::predict

# Helper functions
print_dataset_header <- function(data, name = deparse(substitute(data))) {
  cat(sprintf("Dataset: %s (n=%d", name, length(data$y)))
  if (!is.null(data$X)) cat(sprintf(", p=%d", ncol(data$X)))
  cat(")\n")
  invisible(NULL)
}

# Locate datasets when the package is not installed
resolve_data_file <- function(filename) {
  candidates <- c(
    file.path("data", filename),
    file.path("..", "data", filename),
    file.path("..", "..", "data", filename)
  )
  existing <- candidates[file.exists(candidates)]
  if (length(existing) == 0) stop(sprintf("Data file %s not found", filename))
  existing[[1]]
}
```

```{r data}
load(resolve_data_file("nc_pos_tail200_k4.rda"), envir = environment())
print_dataset_header(nc_pos_tail200_k4, "nc_pos_tail200_k4")
```

```{r gpd-fit, eval=TRUE}
# Keep the example runnable: one kernel/backend with a tiny MCMC.
mcmc <- list(niter = 80, nburnin = 20, thin = 1, nchains = 1, seed = 1)

bundle <- build_nimble_bundle(
  y = nc_pos_tail200_k4$y,
  backend = "sb",
  kernel = "gamma",
  GPD = TRUE,
  components = nc_pos_tail200_k4$meta$K_true,
  mcmc = mcmc
)
summary(bundle)

fit <- run_mcmc_bundle_manual(bundle, show_progress = FALSE)
summary(fit)

# Light prediction on the observed grid
pred <- predict(fit, y = sort(nc_pos_tail200_k4$y), type = "survival")
head(pred$fit)
```
